response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack software engineer with strong web, backend, and developer-tooling experience, but the role requires deep specialization in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no evidence of chip-level performance work, deep learning workload optimization at the hardware layer, or relevant architectural research. The skills gap is fundamental rather than incremental.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) of senior software engineering across diverse domains
Some low-level/systems experience via DLang microservices at Sociomantic and C/C++ work at National Instruments
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, and open-source contributions
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator experience
No deep learning training/inference optimization or GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture background
Educational and professional path is web/full-stack focused, not hardware/computer architecture

key_factors.factor: No deep learning workload optimization experience
Senior engineering maturity and systems-level breadth
